Their relationship evolves from one of strict paternal control to a more nuanced dynamic involving mutual recognition of pain, responsibility, and fleeting unity, culminating in Valentina’s mourning of his death. The emotional core remains rooted in familial love complicated by betrayal, power struggles, and the weight of destiny.
